action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 23 training completed (4103 sec) without errors, checkpoints saved (best.pt, last.pt, etc). No test eval for this run yet. Analysis: The run used full replay + joint training with wide ResNet (width=2) and mixup/cutmix; likely similar to iter 20 plan (5 epochs/task + 300 joint epochs). Need to check config and metrics to confirm, then submit eval to get test score. Decision: Cat metrics and config, then submit eval with best.pt.
action.command: echo '=== metrics.jsonl ===' && cat logs/23/metrics.jsonl && echo '=== config.json ===' && cat checkpoints/config.json && echo '=== ls checkpoints/ ===' && ls -lh checkpoints/
